doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Hi, um, I’ve been having this dry cough and, uh, I’m really short of breath. It’s been getting worse over the past three days. I’m kinda worried, to be honest. I also feel really fatigued and have this headache that feels like a squeezing sensation…

doctor_turn: When did you first notice the cough and shortness of breath?
patient_turn: I think it started about three days ago. Um, the cough is dry, and the shortness of breath, it’s, like, not really worse when I’m active, but it happens mostly after I cough. It’s just been really uncomfortable…

doctor_turn: Can you point to where the cough and shortness of breath feel the worst?
patient_turn: Um, I guess it feels pretty much the same all over my chest, but it’s mostly just, like, this tightness when I cough. I don’t really have any chest pain or anything, but the shortness of breath is, um, really concerning for me…

doctor_turn: What does the cough feel like? Is it a dry cough, or does it have any other characteristics?
patient_turn: Um, I think it’s a dry cough, but I’m not really sure if it feels like anything else. It’s just kind of there, I guess?

doctor_turn: How would you describe the shortness of breath? Does it feel different at any time?
patient_turn: Well, it’s, um, kind of a tight feeling, I guess? It’s not really worse when I’m doing things, but it definitely gets worse after I cough. It’s just, like, a constant worry for me…

doctor_turn: Where exactly do you feel the tightness or discomfort in your chest? Does it spread anywhere else?
patient_turn: Um, I feel the tightness mostly in my chest, but it doesn’t really spread anywhere else. It’s just, like, this uncomfortable feeling right there, you know? I’m just trying to figure out what’s going on…

doctor_turn: What does the tightness in your chest feel like? Is it sharp, dull, or more like pressure?

doctor_turn: When did you first notice this tightness in your chest?
patient_turn: I think I noticed the tightness around the same time as the cough and shortness of breath, so, um, about three days ago. It’s just been really stressful, honestly…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any other symptoms along with the tightness in your chest?
patient_turn: Yeah, um, I’ve been feeling really fatigued and I have this headache that feels like a squeezing sensation. I also have mild nasal congestion, but no runny nose or anything like that. It’s just, like, a bunch of stuff happening at once, you know?

doctor_turn: Can you describe where exactly you feel the tightness in your chest?
patient_turn: Um, it’s mostly in the center of my chest, I think? It’s not really sharp or anything, just more like a pressure. It’s hard to explain, but it’s definitely uncomfortable…

doctor_turn: When did you first notice this tightness in your chest?
patient_turn: I noticed the tightness, um, about three days ago, around the same time the cough and shortness of breath started. It’s just been really worrying me, to be honest…

doctor_turn: Has the tightness in your chest changed at all since it first started?
patient_turn: Oh, I never really felt any tightness in my chest, actually. I mean, I think I mentioned it earlier, but I guess it’s not really a problem for me.

doctor_turn: Can you describe where you feel the tightness or discomfort in your chest?
patient_turn: Um, it’s mostly in the center of my chest, I think? It’s not really sharp, just more like a pressure. It’s kind of hard to ignore, you know?

doctor_turn: What does the pressure in your chest feel like—sharp, dull, or something else?
patient_turn: Uh, it feels more like a dull pressure, I guess? It’s not sharp at all, just, um, uncomfortable and kind of persistent. It’s really been bothering me…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any recent asthma flare-ups or needed to visit the hospital?
patient_turn: No, um, I haven’t had any recent asthma flare-ups or needed to go to the hospital. I do have asthma, but I haven’t really been using my inhaler much lately, and it hasn’t helped when I did. I’m just feeling really anxious about all this…

doctor_turn: Do you take any antacids for your reflux symptoms?

doctor_turn: Have you traveled anywhere recently or been in contact with anyone who was sick?

doctor_turn: Do you smoke or use any recreational drugs?
patient_turn: No, I don’t smoke or use any recreational drugs. I mean, I did, like, occasionally in college, but that was a long time ago. I’m just trying to focus on my health now, you know?
